character.definition: (standard form of 詫) to sacrifice by pouring out a libation of wine
(non-classical form of 顯) clear; evident; eminent; prominent; renowned; famed; to expose; to make known
clay-made blowing wind instruments; music instruments made of clay
movement of a horse, a traveling horse
a carp-like fish with fins resembling chicken feet
to dislike, to abhor, to hate
(variant of 穉) young grain; young, tender
bitter; toilsome, laborious; 8th heavenly stem; Kangxi radical 160
